text:
Market today: Tech is still the driver, but headlines about oil and AI policy could be noise or catalysts. Your concentrated tech/chip book is sensitive to these.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL candidate (-37.28%) due to its leveraged nature and current status. QQQI is a TRIM candidate (-2.02%) as an income anchor needing attention.

Watch: Keep an eye on NVDA and MSFT from the scanner list. They have decent setups and could be interesting if the market firms up.

Bottom line: Manage your risk on the leveraged names and watch for clear signals in your core tech holdings.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or exiting due to leveraged decay and negative PnL.
QQQI: Respect the stop at 52; consider trimming if it breaks.
No new buys today - hold and watch
